title: Enhanced Item Naming: Support Text within Braces
excerpt: Currently, when attempting to name items within the Monday platform using text enclosed within braces (e.g., ‘’), the platform interprets this text as HTML rather than plain text, causing the enclosed text to disappear u…

posts.author: giotor (Giovanne Torres)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, when attempting to name items within the Monday platform using text enclosed within braces (e.g., ‘’), the platform interprets this text as HTML rather than plain text, causing the enclosed text to disappear upon saving. The proposed enhancement aims to address this limitation by enabling the platform to recognize and display text enclosed within braces as regular text within item names. This improvement would provide users with the ability to use braces for organizational or descriptive purposes without losing the enclosed text upon saving, thereby enhancing the flexibility and usability of the naming system within Monday
